creator: jim@corebsd.or.id
text:
Yes, I'm ok with the patch.

On Thu, 8 Feb 2007 23:31:37 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of security/flawfinder,
>
> Please note that PR ports/108951 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108951

> Edwin Groothuis
